ai_review.reviewer: Codex GPT curriculum and product review
ai_review.method: Repository curriculum alignment, teaching-sequence, SEND/accessibility, safeguarding, assessment, renderer, gamification and audio-policy checks applied to every authored review variant.
not_claimed: human listening approval for ElevenLabs audio

reference_basis.title: SEND code of practice: 0 to 25 years
reference_basis.authority: Department for Education and Department of Health and Social Care

reference_basis.title: National curriculum in England: framework for key stages 1 to 4
National curriculum in England: Key stage 1 and 2
Special Educational Needs in Mainstream Schools
Five a day: supporting high-quality teaching for pupils with SEND

policy.audio_rule: Produced audio requires technical validation and human listening approval for clarity, pace, warmth and pronunciation.
